title: Motion Graphic Designer (AI Product) — Part-Time / Full-Time (New Role)
description:
About the Role

We’re building a new AI-powered product and looking for a Motion Graphic Designer to bring our ideas to life through high-quality motion design. You’ll work closely with Product, Marketing, and Design to create engaging videos, animations, and visual storytelling that explains “why this matters” in a simple, modern, and compelling way.
If you enjoy both creative storytelling and clean, product-led visuals, this role is for you

What you’ll do

  • Create motion graphics for product launches, ads, app/website content, and social media (e.g., 6–30s short-form, explainers, UI animation).
  • Translate briefs into strong storyboards, keyframes, and final animations with good pacing, rhythm, and clarity.
  • Animate UI/UX flows (micro-interactions, feature walkthroughs, app demos) to improve product understanding and conversion.
  • Produce video assets for campaigns: hooks, end cards, typography animation, transitions, icon animation, and brand bumpers.
  • Collaborate with product designers and marketers to refine messaging and visuals quickly through iterations.
  • Maintain a consistent style while helping evolve our visual identity for a modern AI brand.
  • Familiar with implementing interactive UI and animation for character- or pet-based features (e.g. idle reactions, feedback, growth states), using Framer Motion, Rive or similar tools.


Requirements

  • 1–3+ years of relevant experience (agency/in-house/freelance welcome) with a strong showreel/portfolio.
  • Proficient in Adobe After Effects (required) + good foundation in Premiere Pro.
  • Solid understanding of timing, composition, typography, and storytelling.
  • Able to work independently and manage timelines; comfortable with fast iteration.
  • Good communication skills and openness to feedback.
  • Familiar with implementing interactive UI and animation for character- or pet-based features (e.g. idle reactions, feedback, growth states), using Framer Motion, Rive or similar tools.

Bonus points

  • Experience with 3D tools (Blender / Cinema 4D) or 3D elements in AE.
  • Illustration skills (Adobe Illustrator / Figma) or icon design.
  • Familiarity with AI creative workflows (e.g., rapid concepting, style exploration).
  • Experience producing content for TikTok/IG Reels/YouTube Shorts.
  • Experience in EdTech / consumer apps / B2C performance creatives.

What we offer

  • Chance to shape visuals for a brand-new AI product from early stage (high impact).
  • Flexible arrangement: Part-time or Full-time.
  • Fast learning environment with direct collaboration with decision makers.
  • Opportunity to build a strong, high-visibility portfolio with real product outcomes.

postedCompany.description:
About the Company
Wild Dynasty is committed to building a knowledge-oriented metaverse based on Web 3.0 technology and AI algorithms such as blockchain and deep learning. It also offers related services such as SaaS or PaaS for international companies.

1. Market
Our initial focus is on Southeast Asia, where more people are projected to adopt the metaverse system. This presents a significant opportunity for new-tech ventures and companies to thrive.

2. Product
We are developing mobile games for people eager to explore the metaverse and are looking for a gateway to access it. These games serve as seamless entry points, helping users effortlessly immerse themselves in this new, open world.

3. Service
In addition, we offer SaaS and  PaaS services to companies operating in sectors such as entertainment, education, and training. Our services will enable these businesses to focus on their core operations more efficiently.

4. Technology
Our research and development focus includes the following areas:
1. AI
(1) Knowledge engineering based on NLP (Natural Language Processing) and personalized recommended algorithms.
(2) Human-machine game simulation leveraging machine learning and deep
learning techniques.

2. Web 3.0
(1) Utilizing GameFi and NFT technologies to manage digital assets within games.
(2) Providing unsupervised competition platforms and services for the E-Sports industry.
We warmly welcome talented individuals who share our passion and are committed to our mission. In return, we offer competitive compensation and opportunities for professional growth.


Contact Number: 6514 8661

Company Address: 2 International Business Park. Tower 2 #05-26 Singapore 609930
postedCompany.name: WILD DYNASTY PTE. LTD.
